## Verification

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run python -m compileall backend tests`
- [ ] `uv audit`
- [ ] `uv run pip-audit`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run test`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
